name: app-mri-registration-qc
title: Registration QC
desc: Quality check for MRI image registration. Computes voxel-based similarity metrics (NMI, NCC, MSE, SSIM) between a fixed reference image and a registered (moving) image, and generates visual QC figures (checkerboard, edge-overlay, difference map) for axial, coronal, and sagittal views. When AFNI is available, also runs @djunct_edgy_align_check to produce additional edge-based alignment figures (edgy_align.*.png).
author: Gabriele Amorosino <gabriele.amorosino@utexas.edu>
cite: Hayashi, S., et al. (2024). brainlife.io: a decentralized and open-source cloud platform to support neuroscience research. Nature methods, 21(5), 809-813.

inputs.desc: Fixed (reference) MRI image in NIfTI format
Moving (registered) MRI image in NIfTI format — must be in the same space as the fixed image
Optional binary brain mask in fixed image space, used to restrict metric computation to the brain

outputs.desc: QC report: metrics.json and PNG figures (axial, coronal, sagittal)

checkerboard_tiles.desc: Number of checkerboard tiles per axis in the overlay figure
